title: HAS Client Pack
description: This is a client side modpack with optimisations and QOL additions designed for playing Hunters Among Speedrunners.
body:
# Hunters Among Speedrunners Client pack
This is a client side modpack built for playing the minigame [Hunters Among Speedrunners](https://github.com/zymsbgt/hunters-among-speedrunners) by ZymSB. It includes a collection of performance mods, utility/QOL mods and Plasmo Voice. 

 It is fully client side, so if you want a simple fabric performance and utility pack, you can use it for that too.


Special thanks to Xaero for letting me use [Xaero's Minimap (Fair Play)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-minimap-fair-play-edition) and [World Map](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-world-map) in this modpack.
